hero.title: AI for Builders
hero.description: Your AI virtual assistant helps builders manage calls, schedule site inspections, capture job details, track projects, and follow up with clients — so you can focus on building, not admin.

stats.label: Fewer missed job enquiries with automated call answering.
Reduction in time spent on scheduling and follow-ups.
Higher project conversion with fast, professional responses.

blocks.heading: Modern Solutions for Modern Builders
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we understand that every call to your building business could be a new project, renovation, or site inspection. Our AI Virtual Receptionist ensures every enquiry is answered professionally, capturing job details and booking site visits without interruption.

blocks.heading: Focus on Building, Not Phone Calls
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist handles incoming calls, client questions, and scheduling while you're on-site or after hours. It can answer questions like 'Can I book a site inspection?' or 'Do you handle renovations or new builds?' while maintaining a professional and friendly tone.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Job Opportunity
blocks.description: Whether you're on the tools, in meetings, or outside business hours, your AI Receptionist is always available. It explains your services — from residential builds to renovations and extensions — and ensures every enquiry is captured and followed up.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Boost your building business with intelligent automation that saves time, captures more leads, and improves client communication.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Builders Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Builders across Australia trust our AI Virtual Receptionist to manage calls, book site visits, and capture accurate job details. It integrates seamlessly with your scheduling tools and CRM, acting as an extension of your team — not a replacement.

card.heading: Streamline Job Follow-Ups and Communication
card.description: After each call or site visit, builders can record quick voice notes that are transcribed and summarised automatically. The AI also manages follow-up reminders for quotes, approvals, and project milestones, keeping jobs moving forward.
